title: GrowGeneration Reports Strong 2024 Performance, Eyes 2025 Growth
text: GrowGeneration 2024 Completion and 2025 Outlook. 2024 Full Year: Revenue $188.9 million, down from $225.9 million in 2023. Company completed restructuring including store consolidations. Proprietary brands reached 24.2% penetration. Zero debt maintained. 2025 Guidance: Revenue $170-180 million. Adjusted EBITDA breakeven to slight profit. Management optimistic about turnaround progress. Margin expansion continuing. B2B focus gaining traction. Proprietary brand growth accelerating. Company positioned for profitability inflection. Market stabilization expected to support continued growth.
